chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 567 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.4838/2022 (S/A) 21.05.2024 Applicant No.1 is present in person. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General along with Lutuf Ali Sodhar, Inspector FIA, Cyber Crime Circle, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant No.1 submits that he has already joined inquiry being conducted by FIA on the allegations that he had made a fake identity of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, President, High Court Bar Association, Sukkur through his relative Rab Nawaz. Inspector FIA, filing a statement, has confirmed this fact and submits that FIA has no intention to arrest the applicant as the case is at the stage of inquiry. He further submits that if inquiry is converted into investigation, applicant would be given a due notice thereof and in any case he would not be arrested unless some cogent evidence comes on record against him. Accordingly, applicant is satisfied and seeks disposal of the application in the said terms. Criminal miscellaneous application stands disposed of along with listed application, in above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
